title: Shurik
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Shurik''''' was the designation given to a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]]. The vessels of this group were destroyed while escorting the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] ''[[Dotermin]]'' and ''[[Sornsen]]'', which had attempted to resupply the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
